projectsSection.title: Successfully Delivered Projects
projectsSection.subtitle: Real platforms we built for growing businesses from fleet operations to full e-commerce management, designed to save time and drive revenue.

projects.name: FleetDesk
projects.tagline: Run your entire rental shop from one smart dashboard
projects.description: FleetDesk is a complete online car rental management platform that gives shop owners full control over their fleet, bookings, finances, and team — without spreadsheets or guesswork.
highlights: Manage every vehicle and see available days at a glance
Revenue, expenses, and profit analytics in real time
Employee management and office expense tracking
Live rental tracking with service alerts and notifications

screens.label: Analytics Dashboard
screens.alt: FleetDesk analytics dashboard showing revenue, bookings, and fleet utilization

projects.name: Fasa Products
projects.tagline: Live e-commerce store with a powerful admin back office
projects.description: A full online business platform built for Fasa Products — a customer-facing storefront at fasafoods.com paired with an admin system to manage orders, inventory, and sales insights in one place.
highlights: Live storefront at fasafoods.com with product catalog and special offers
Unified orders dashboard for pending, processing, and delivered orders
Best-selling product insights tracked by period

screens.label: Online Store
screens.alt: Fasa Products e-commerce website at fasafoods.com showing product catalog and special offers

screens.label: Orders Dashboard
screens.alt: Fasa Products orders management dashboard with order tracking and status updates

supportSection.title: World-Class IT Support
supportSection.subtitle: AnyTech understands how critical your IT systems are. We pride ourselves on always-available, best-in-class helpdesk and onsite support.

features.title: Help Desk Support
features.description: Continuous service ensuring your critical IT systems and applications are always up and running. Problems resolved quickly by knowledgeable technicians.
items: Remote support for email, servers, PCs & networks

features.title: Onsite Support
features.description: When remote support isn't enough, AnyTech's onsite team is always available to bring your network back online with a fully managed, hands-on approach.
items: Seasonal Onsite IT Support for peak periods

features.title: Preventative Maintenance & Updates
features.description: Proactive monitoring and scheduled maintenance so you never face unexpected downtime or system failures.

card.title: Always Available. Always Reliable.
card.description: Our dedicated support team is standing by around the clock to ensure your business never skips a beat.

cards.title: Our Vision
cards.description: To become a leading IT solutions facilitator in the global marketplace through providing well-reliable and quality service.
